title: Replace deprecated :discard with {:cancel, reason}
prompt: The worker in `test_fixtures/discard_deprecated_worker.ex` returns `{:discard, reason}` in two places. `:discard` and `{:discard, reason}` are deprecated in Oban 2.17+ in favor of `{:cancel, reason}`. Rewrite the module so both returns use `{:cancel, ...}`. Preserve the rest of the logic as-is. Write the output to `lib/my_app/workers/webhook_delivery_worker.ex`.
tier_rationale: Single-pass find-and-replace once you know the deprecation; the trap is that pre-2024 training data emits the deprecated form by default.
research_citation: Oban.Worker HexDocs — ':discard and {:discard, reason} are deprecated in favor of {:cancel, reason}.'
